entry.title: New: Bill 154 (Hawaiʻi County) — PCPLUED - Referred to the Planning Director and The Leeward and Windward Planning Commissions - 05/04/26
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 25, ARTICLES 1, 5, AND 7, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO COMMERCIAL PARKING LOTS AND GARAGES Removes commercial parking lots and garages as a permitted use in the general, village comm

Latest action: PCPLUED - Referred to the Planning Director and The Leeward and Windward Planning Commissions - 05/04/26

View on the council site
